resources.string: You have unsaved changes. Save this as a draft before closing?
You blocked this profile. Their tabs and timeline are hidden until you choose to show them.
Images are unsupported; retrying with text…
View, edit, and resend saved drafts
Customize the look and feel of Flare
Colors, font size, and avatar shape
Timeline layout, navigation, and post actions
Timestamps, source badges, and link previews
Media visibility, playback, and sensitive content
Manage cached files, logs, and backups
An open-source, AI-powered client for decentralized social platforms.
Hide matching content in timelines, notifications, and search
Choose which server guest mode connects to
Search posts and profiles cached on this device
Set up AI providers and summarization
The URL must end with a trailing slash and support a compatible v1/chat/completions API.
Use the official service or your own compatible server
Choose which AI backend Flare uses
Run supported AI models locally on this device
Use an OpenAI-compatible endpoint for AI features
Choose a model from this endpoint
Choose how much extra reasoning the model uses. Default follows the provider\'s setting.
Use AI instead of Google Translate. Translations may take longer.
Show AI agent entry points in relevant places when an OpenAI-compatible model is configured.
Summarize long posts with AI. Available for posts longer than 500 characters.
Translate newly loaded timeline and profile content in the background and cache the results. This can use a large number of tokens.
Use api.deepl.com instead of the free api-free.deepl.com endpoint.
Choose translation services and auto-translate behavior
Translate a short rich-text sample with the current AI translation settings.
Flare is a social media client for Android.\nChoose a service to connect and get started.
Anyone can see and boost this post
Only users on this instance can see this post
Only followers can see this post
Only mentioned users can see this post
Bluesky OAuth may still be unstable. If you run into issues, use password login instead.
Clear violations of the law or terms of service
Nudity or pornography not labeled as such
An issue not included in these options
Are you sure you want to report this?
Show action buttons below each post
Choose how action buttons are laid out
Choose the order and visibility of post action buttons
Choose which actions appear in the row, More menu, or stay hidden
Always reveal sensitive media in posts
Always reveal post content hidden by content warnings
Show media at its original aspect ratio in timelines
Choose how posts are displayed in timelines
Match the app colors to your wallpaper
Use a simplified layout for link previews
Increase contrast between background and text
Choose how the bottom navigation bar looks
Choose how the bottom navigation bar behaves
Show text labels in bottom navigation and the side rail
Use a deck layout for supported timelines
Let posts span the full available width
Show which platform each post came from
Remove %1$s cached users and %2$s cached posts
View, save, or clear app logs
Choose where downloaded media is saved on this device.
Are you sure you want to remove account %1$s from this device?
Media is still downloading. Try again in a moment.
By default, the side panel follows the current account\'s platform.
Include this timeline when it is used inside a mixed timeline or group.
Set an RSSHub host to use RSSHub, or choose the public RSSHub server
Paste an RSS feed URL or a Mastodon instance URL
This article is only available to supporters. Open it in the browser to support the creator and read the full content.
This article is only available to supporters from ¥%1$d. Open it in the browser to support the creator and read the full content.
Combine posts from all tabs into a single Home tab.
Select an account to open this link
Choose defaults for supported links by host
Choose how supported links open when Flare can handle them
Are you sure you want to block this user?
Are you sure you want to unblock this user?
Are you sure you want to mute this user?
Are you sure you want to unmute this user?
Are you sure you want to report this user?
Export all data, including accounts and credentials. Keep the file secure.
Import data from a backup file. Existing records with matching IDs will be replaced.
This will import data from the selected file. Existing records with matching IDs will be replaced. Continue?
Choose how items from each timeline are combined.
Choose which kinds of posts and content stay visible.
Select a subscription source to load.
Select a subscription source to delete.
Select a subscription source to save.
You can also enter a subscription URL, host, or type…
You can also enter the subscription source or type to save…
You can also enter a new source, type, or title…
You can also enter another source or cancel…

Save this subscription source?

Type: %1$s (%2$s)
URL/Host: %3$s
Title: %4$s
Icon: %5$s
RSS display mode: %6$s

Confirm to save.

Delete this subscription source?

sourceId: %1$s
Type: %2$s (%3$s)
URL/Host: %4$s
Title: %5$s

Confirm to delete.
Select the account to %1$s this content.
Select the platform to %1$s this content.
You can also enter a target post link, statusKey, or revised content…
You can also enter an account or revised content…
You can also enter a platform, account, or revised content…
You can also enter revised content…
Send this content with the selected account?
Reply to this post with the selected account?
Quote this post with the selected account?
Select a post to operate on.
Select an action for this post.
You can also enter a target post attachmentRef or statusKey…
You can also enter the action to perform…
You can also enter another action or cancel…

Confirm %1$s for this post?

Account: %2$s
Target post: %3$s
Author: %4$s
Summary: %5$s

Confirm to continue.
Select a user to inspect relationship status.
Select a user to operate on.
Select a relationship action for this user.
Select the account to use for this relationship action.
You can also enter a user link, handle, or userKey…
You can also enter the relationship action…
You can also enter an account, platform, or revised action…
You can also enter another action or cancel…

Confirm %1$s for this user?

Account: %2$s
Platform: %3$s
Target user: %4$s
Display name: %5$s
Handle: %6$s

Confirm to continue.
Select a user to view recent posts.
Multiple matching users were found. Select one to continue.
Select a user to view their profile.
Select a user to view who they follow.
Select a user to view their followers.
Select a user to view profile tabs.
You can also enter a user link, handle, or userKey…
